status_notes: No official English translation exists for the General Rules edition (the one with concrete security-control detail) as of 2026-07-16 — Japanese only. A few narrower PPC guideline documents (e.g. on transparency, data portability) do have provisional English translations, but not this one.
notes: See also registry/regulation/jp/go/ppc.json (the Act on the Protection of Personal Information itself) for the regulation-type file under this same namespace.

match_nodes.description: Guidelines for the Act on the Protection of Personal Information (General Rules) — PPC's implementing/interpretive guidance with concrete security-control detail

data.official_name: Guidelines for the Act on the Protection of Personal Information (General Rules)
data.notes: Originally issued November 2016, most recently partially revised December 2024. Covers definitions and operator obligations, with a dedicated 'Security Control Measures' section requiring organizational, personnel, physical, and technical safeguards, plus supervision-of-outsourcing/sub-entrustment requirements. Turns the APPI's (secid:regulation/ppc.go.jp/appi) high-level statutory language into concrete, auditable security-control expectations — the practical compliance reference for any organization handling personal data in Japan. No official English translation exists for this General Rules edition as of 2026-07-16.
